hot_topics.summary: Testnet patch airdrop eligibility list released, claim opens May 8 with tier-based and loyalty rewards, community sharing eligibility status.

official_announcements.content:
SoDEX has received and reviewed 200+ valid bug reports from the community.

🛡️ Mainnet bugs: 130+ reports 
🌐 Testnet bugs: 70+ reports

Eligible contributors have received in-app notifications, with extra SoPoints granted.

Rewards are based on first valid submissions and verified bug reports.

Thank you for helping make SoDEX stronger. 🧡

#SoDEX #SoSoValue #SoPoints

SoPoints Week 12 has been distributed.

12 weeks in — your tier is no longer just a number, it’s a record of how consistently you’ve shown up across the ecosystem.

Check your latest points and tier now.

👉 https://sodex.com/points

What tier are you at this week? 👀

#SoPoints #SoSoValue #SoDEX #SOSO

✅ SoDEX testnet patch airdrop list is here.

A make-good drop — for those we missed, and for those who proved through appeals that they're real builders, not bots.

🔍 Check now → https://testnet.sodex.com/points

🎁 Claim opens on May 8, 12:00 UTC
We added Loyalty Rewards (hint: extra $SOSO)   for those who have been building SoDEX with us since Day 1, starting from the  SoDEX testnet days.

One more thing: your SoDEX status has value. The higher your SoPoints Tier, the more you get. 🥈 Silver → 🥇 Gold → 💎 Diamond

Not on the list? Appeal here →  https://t.co/QAuXtmboLL

Show us your number  👇 Let's see who the real builders are.
